OBERONPRETENDER-DEBT_POWER.title: Debt
OBERONPRETENDER-DEBT_POWER.description: #Loan cards grant resources now and add Debt (cap 15). At the end of your turn, your NP Charge pays your Debt (10 NP per point); each unpaid point gains 1 Interest next turn and costs you 3 HP. While Debt reaches your credit limit, you cannot play Loans.
OBERONPRETENDER-DEBT_POWER.smartDescript: #Loan cards grant resources now and add Debt (cap 15). At the end of your turn, your NP Charge pays your Debt (10 NP per point); each unpaid point gains 1 Interest next turn and costs you 3 HP. While Debt reaches your credit limit, you cannot play Loans.
OBERONPRETENDER-INTEREST_IN_MY_FAVOR_POW: #Whenever you play a Loan card, gain NP Charge (and Critical Stars when upgraded).
#Whenever you play a Loan card, gain NP Charge (and Critical Stars when upgraded).
OBERONPRETENDER-NOCTURNAL_EUPHORIA_POWER: #At the end of your turn, if you have no remaining Debt, gain NP Charge and Critical Stars.
#At the end of your turn, if you have no remaining Debt, gain NP Charge and Critical Stars.
OBERONPRETENDER-INSECTS_VIGIL_POWER.desc: #At the start of your turn, gain NP Charge (and Critical Stars when upgraded).
OBERONPRETENDER-INSECTS_VIGIL_POWER.smar: #At the start of your turn, gain NP Charge (and Critical Stars when upgraded).
OBERONPRETENDER-LUCK_EX_POWER.title: Luck EX
OBERONPRETENDER-LUCK_EX_POWER.descriptio: #At the start of your turn, gain Critical Stars.
OBERONPRETENDER-LUCK_EX_POWER.smartDescr: #At the start of your turn, gain Critical Stars.
OBERONPRETENDER-NIGHT_READING_POWER.desc: #At the start of your turn, draw additional cards. A second copy draws 1 more.
OBERONPRETENDER-NIGHT_READING_POWER.smar: #At the start of your turn, draw additional cards. A second copy draws 1 more.
#At the start of your turn, gain 1 Overcharge Blessing, pushing your ultimates toward the massive dream.
#At the start of your turn, gain 1 Overcharge Blessing, pushing your ultimates toward the massive dream.
OBERONPRETENDER-THREAT_TO_HUMANITY_POWER: #Whenever an enemy dies to your damage, gain NP Charge and Critical Stars.
#Whenever an enemy dies to your damage, gain NP Charge and Critical Stars.
OBERONPRETENDER-VESPERS_OF_THE_END_POWER: #Only while in Vortigern, your Attacks deal additional damage. Does nothing in any other form.
#Only while in Vortigern, your Attacks deal additional damage. Does nothing in any other form.
OBERONPRETENDER-WINGS_OF_REVERIE_POWER.d: #Whenever you play a Noble Phantasm card, gain Critical Stars and draw 1.
OBERONPRETENDER-WINGS_OF_REVERIE_POWER.s: #Whenever you play a Noble Phantasm card, gain Critical Stars and draw 1.
OBERONPRETENDER-STORYBOOK_KING_POWER.des: #Starting form. The first Loan card you play each turn grants +10 NP Charge and adds 1 extra Debt — the tale sweetens the deal.
OBERONPRETENDER-STORYBOOK_KING_POWER.sma: #Starting form. The first Loan card you play each turn grants +10 NP Charge and adds 1 extra Debt — the tale sweetens the deal.
OBERONPRETENDER-WINTER_PRINCE_POWER.desc: #Defensive form. At the end of your turn your Debt is not collected; instead it gains 1 Interest (the snowball). Your Winter payoffs grant Block.
OBERONPRETENDER-WINTER_PRINCE_POWER.smar: #Defensive form. At the end of your turn your Debt is not collected; instead it gains 1 Interest (the snowball). Your Winter payoffs grant Block.
OBERONPRETENDER-VORTIGERN_POWER.title: Vortigern
OBERONPRETENDER-VORTIGERN_POWER.descript: #Permanent climax form. Your Attacks deal 3 more and strike Sleeping enemies without waking them. At the end of your turn, up to 5 unpaid Debt deals 2 damage to ALL enemies per point instead of costing you HP (NP pays first; any excess still bleeds).
OBERONPRETENDER-VORTIGERN_POWER.smartDes: #Permanent climax form. Your Attacks deal 3 more and strike Sleeping enemies without waking them. At the end of your turn, up to 5 unpaid Debt deals 2 damage to ALL enemies per point instead of costing you HP (NP pays first; any excess still bleeds).
OBERONPRETENDER-SLEEP_POWER.title: Sleep
OBERONPRETENDER-SLEEP_POWER.description: #This enemy does not act on its next turn, and all Attack damage it would take is nullified (untouchable in the world of dreams). It wakes at the end of that turn and gains Insomnia 2.
OBERONPRETENDER-SLEEP_POWER.smartDescrip: #This enemy does not act on its next turn, and all Attack damage it would take is nullified (untouchable in the world of dreams). It wakes at the end of that turn and gains Insomnia 2.
OBERONPRETENDER-INSOMNIA_POWER.title: Insomnia
OBERONPRETENDER-INSOMNIA_POWER.descripti: #While this enemy has Insomnia, it cannot be put to Sleep. Counts down by 1 at the start of its turn.
OBERONPRETENDER-INSOMNIA_POWER.smartDesc: #While this enemy has Insomnia, it cannot be put to Sleep. Counts down by 1 at the start of its turn.
#Your Weak and Vulnerable apply 1 extra stack. When upgraded, you also gain 5 NP Charge per application.
#Your Weak and Vulnerable apply 1 extra stack. When upgraded, you also gain 5 NP Charge per application.
OBERONPRETENDER-ULT_MANIFESTED_POWER.des: #Your Noble Phantasm has already manifested at this gauge peak. Clears when your NP Charge drops below 100.
OBERONPRETENDER-ULT_MANIFESTED_POWER.sma: #Your Noble Phantasm has already manifested at this gauge peak. Clears when your NP Charge drops below 100.
OBERONPRETENDER-COURT_OF_INSECT_FAE_POWE: #At the start of your turn, add a King Fae's Word to your hand (it still costs its normal Energy). A second copy adds 1 more.
#At the start of your turn, add a King Fae's Word to your hand (it still costs its normal Energy). A second copy adds 1 more.
OBERONPRETENDER-EVENING_SHROUD_POWER.des: #For the next few turns, your Noble Phantasm cards deal 30% more damage. The counter is the turns remaining.
OBERONPRETENDER-EVENING_SHROUD_POWER.sma: #For the next few turns, your Noble Phantasm cards deal 30% more damage. The counter is the turns remaining.
OBERONPRETENDER-ENDING_OF_DREAMS_POWER.d: #This turn your Attacks deal 50% more (x1.5) and your next Noble Phantasm card deals double. At the end of the turn, you lose ALL positive Powers and draw no cards next turn (the Eternal Sleep).
OBERONPRETENDER-ENDING_OF_DREAMS_POWER.s: #This turn your Attacks deal 50% more (x1.5) and your next Noble Phantasm card deals double. At the end of the turn, you lose ALL positive Powers and draw no cards next turn (the Eternal Sleep).
#You draw no cards on your next turn.
#You draw no cards on your next turn.
